last_assistant_message:
Good. The implementation is complete and committed. Let me verify the final file list:

DONE: Doctor probes implemented, tested, wired, and tagged `ops-4-doctor-probes`.

Files:
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\doctor\probes\llm-chat-probe.ts`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\doctor\probes\embed-probe.ts`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\doctor\probes\plugin-coexistence.ts`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\tests\doctor\probes\llm-chat-probe.test.ts`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\tests\doctor\probes\embed-probe.test.ts`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\tests\doctor\probes\plugin-coexistence.test.ts`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\doctor\checks.ts` (modified)

Risks: 3 test failures in full run (`tests/cli/init.test.ts` x2, `tests/distill/pipeline.test.ts` x4) are caused by OTHER tracks' unstaged source changes to `src/distill/pipeline.ts` and `src/distill/stages/05-extract.ts` — confirmed pre-existing by git stash isolation. All 42 files excluding those 3 pass clean (348 tests + 4 skipped). Acceptance criteria 1-7 all verified. The CLI caller of `getChecks()` needs a follow-up to pass `llmProviders` and `embedProvider` by instantiating via `getProviders(cfg)` — the `DoctorCheckOpts` extension is ready but the CLI wiring is out of scope (touches `src/cli/` which is already modified by other tracks).

Next: Wire `getProviders(cfg)` into the doctor CLI command (`src/cli/index.ts`) so `llmProviders` and `embedProvider` are passed through at runtime — currently those opts are optional so doctor runs safely without them; the CLI caller just needs `getProviders(cfg)` and pass the result.
